title: Options
description:
Options

Options

EPSON offers the following options for Vision Guide:

			Camera Mounting Bracket to attach the camera to the robot.  (Specify robot type when ordering).
			High resolution cameras.
			Additional cameras.
			Ten meter camera cable.
			Camera Power Junction Box (provides power to the camera).
			Camera Lens Kit.
			Individual Camera Lenses.
			Camera Extension Tube Kit.
